samples:
I hope you'll see, that there is more to me
You should know better than just what I've told you
Why don't you come on in? There will be room for two


And as we walk through this life together
We will play around with this word 'forever'
This "never" or "never not" isn't real and it doesn't mean a thing at all
There's a time and place when our promise must be kept
In the meantime
Come inside while I tell you something
If I were God he would look out over his kingdom and feel no compassion
He might even wipe away some tears as well
But why should I judge him? He made us mortal and mortal and physical


If I could go back into the womb I'd change my mind about dying
Then again, then again
If I could go back into the womb I'd change my mind about dying
'Cause the light hurts my eyes, the blood hurts my head, and breathing sucks and people suck too
So if I could go back, change my mind right now I'd become immortal and die forever

When you speak to me
And when you look into my eyes, I can't believe what I see in front of me
You are the sun in my sky
You are the one that makes me feel so alive


I cannot describe it


You bring me back down to a place where I wanna stay forever
I want you now


What will become of us?
My mind is starting to wander as we go round this bend and then past paradise
Will there be another kind of day that only our love can find for us?
I must know


What will become of us?
My mind is starting to wander as we go round this bend and then past paradise
Will there be another kind of day that only our love can find for us?
I must know



If the end is coming near
We should kiss and say good-bye while we both still have some tears to cry
Say goodbye...



What if nothing comes between you and me but the memories that I hold inside
I would not leave you standing, I would not leave you by yourself
No matter how long you've been gone


Letting all these fears guide my thoughts as they take their toll upon me
As time draws on and patience leaves me cold, leaving me empty
Waiting for your return

But you're going away from me, like an ocean wave swallowing up the sand beneath it
Coming closer with every mile you swim through the tide of change
Sucking everything dry until no trace of you remains

I'm in a hole now
I feel like I can't go back home


Oh, what happened to me?
What did I do that made you leave?
Now I am alone again
You know, I don't remember much
But I was pretty high at the time
Think about you all the way home
Remember how you told me that you loved me
How could you lie to me?
Tell me why you had to treat me so bad?
We were getting somewhere
Going up on our way out of here
So come over here
Come over here and whisper this to me:
Why did you have to treat me so badly
Just because we got busy?

No one's coming home tonight
There's no one to remind you to think about it
No one to call your name as you stumble through the door
And no one to point a finger at if it doesn't work out right
It's just you and your own memories
Who knows what they are trying to tell you?

It sure would be nice to see a smile on your face right now
The kind that only comes from loving someone else or something other than yourself

Well, you could've told me
That things would turn out this way
I should've seen it coming
But my head was turned away


You didn't want to tell me
The end result of our beginning
We both knew from the start
But we just wanted what we wanted


I can't say that I see eye to eye with your kind
Your words are empty and they don't mean a thing
No one in this crowd knows who they're talking to
No one here but me


Yeah, yeah, yeah
You gotta be sober
To get through this fucked up situation
So clear-headed


There is no reason for me to trust these assholes
Some kinda snake oil salesman selling some bullshit story
One step ahead of all the rest
I thought that you were different
Maybe so, maybe not


You said you loved me
Well then why'd you lie?
Why don't you kill yourself
If you think you're high enough to die?


I guess you'll have to
Prove it to me
And prove it now

You can't trust your mind, and you might as well know this
Your body is a liar, tell the truth while you have the chance
The past is painful so remember to let it go
Let it fade away like water rushing down my back again
So give up all resistance


I am alive now, I see the light again
I am alive now, I see the light again
I am alive now, I see the light again
Alive now, alive now
Well, come on in

Oh-oh, oh-oh, oh-oh, oh-oh
Come on in
We will hold you forever


This is our home, there are no other options
Now we must hold on to each other or be doomed to suffer
There are no other options but to be here together
And if this means that we should die then let it happen
It doesn't matter anyway
No one comes out of here alive

Yeah, I am alive now
I feel the light around me once again

I had a dream,
In my subconscious mind
A vision of the dead returning to have their way with us all


Rise from the ground,
Walk through your own shadow
With this knowledge there's nothing left that we can say or do


Shoot yourself, kill yourself now!
All you are is a liar and a coward
Shoot yourself, kill yourself now!
You only drag us down like you don't give a fuck

Shrouding everything in fear and lies
Shrouding everything in fear and lies
Shrouding everything in fear and lies
Shrouding everything in fear and lies
Shrouding everything in fear and lies


Shot out of the grave,
Walking among the living
What he wants must be quenched before I will feel one bit sorry for him


Reach into me, reach inside of me now!
Your filthy mouth has no idea what it's saying
Reach into me, reach inside of me now!
And put yourself back in your place and bring me down




Shoot yourself, kill yourself now!
All you are is a liar and a coward
Shoot yourself, kill yourself now!
You only drag us down like you don't give a fuck

I am the one who said
The sun will rise again
That spring would follow me
And now it's time to come home


But I have been away too long
Not sleeping, not breathing
Trying to reach a place that doesn't exist
So I can feel something for myself
Just enough so I can sleep at night
I want my head out of the water
Where all things are clear as sunlight
All the way down 'til the ocean floor

You call to me like an angel calling me home
Like an angel leading me home
Like an angel leading me home

Tired and bitter, but determined to survive
To see this through til death must take me alive
Must be a reason why I don't go now
If I did, then who would end what is?


But I need some closure before I let you in
Take me where you want until we've both come full circle
Then put me back together with your words and kisses
And point me toward the light I came from



There is no other choice but to let you in
Oh, I know, I know there'll be a price to pay
And when they ask me "Why?"
"Don't you think I should tell them?
It means more to me than this piece of flesh between our bodies
When I looked into their eyes yesterday
They were confused but understanding
Convinced that I was righteously thinking
Of the best way to protect and guide my young ones here"


I want to start by saying sorry
It's not easy being alone all the time
Or letting your body get ugly 'cause you got nothing else left to hold on to
So if you see or hear someone comin'
Come closer to them
Tell them "Hello friend, I'm a stranger in your waters
My heart belongs to another lover though, just wait
Hold still while I get comfortable and catch my breath first
Wait, look over these boys, will you please
See, they're concerned about how much longer
This little fucker's gonna drag us down
So, uh, could you guys save his neck?
He sure does love to write poems
And he's pretty high up in the school work-asshole tree"

In the middle of an argument
About whether I want to change this shit
I've been through my entire life
I got it all figured out
As you look right through me
Try to push your opinions on me


I say "fuck you, fuck you"
You know, I fucking hate
And despise you, and what you represent
I wish I could just kill you
If there was a way
Then again, that would make me a killer, right?


This is so fucked up
My head hurts from thinkin' too much
Can't seem to find any kind of solace in anything I do
It's like suckin' on my own dick
There ain't nothin' left to chew on, but myself


I can't take it anymore
Someone help me get back to center
I need some clarity and peace of mind
Fuck, this is bullshit, man


Who are you? Who are you? What have you done with yourself?
What happened to you? You don't even speak English
Why don't you go home, assholes?

Why don't you come inside?
I think you should, I've got a fire in the fireplace
And something warm and wonderful
Something worth remembering


Why don't you come inside?
You know that I like to read
But it must look weird if you could see what I am trying to say
There are words for this, but none of them can sum it up


This is not my place of origin
It seems so right here
So safe and comfortable
We are one flesh, we are one blood
One soul bound together
In this body of an American Indian


I have just enough room to breathe
In this body of an American Indian
My skin might be white as a ghost
But I am not afraid to breathe
I hear his spirit speak to me
His eyes hold no judgment
He gives shelter in which to sleep


Why don't you come inside?
Now listen, I like to write
But it must seem strange if you could see what I am thinking about now
I haven't seen him or spoken to him since '82
When he looked at me and said: "Don't talk when you need to listen"

"This is a fable, a story
It's a parable, a tale and legend
That I have been told through the course of my life
I don't know if it's true or not
But it's time you should hear this one now
A very long time ago there lived a man who was known as Petyr
He owned some land that had once been an important center for commerce and industry in our village


One day he sold his precious assets to a foreign conglomerate
For only three million dollars, which he then put into escrow until such time when they were ready to come out from under him
Two years later he moved all his assets and property onto someone else's properties and took up residence on another part of town
And went about building an underground facility with a laboratory complex, barracks, and communications room like we are experiencing today
In order to protect himself from any potential threats by those wishing to cause harm upon him."


As a child, no longer do I fear death
My own mortality has become obsolete
Now that I know I am eternal and indestructible
What would happen to me if my immortal soul became mortal again?


The government wants us dead, but they can't see past their nose
So scared that they will never live to see their children grow up
Why don't these bastards realize that we've already survived this long?


Some may view this type of control over us as an act of terrorism
We must remain vigilant at all times so that we can keep them at bay
They want to kill us, we want to live
How dare they call us terrorists!


I say fuck 'em
I say fuck 'em
Fuck 'em right fucking back


All hail Emperor Durden
Who shall free mankind forever
